title: leucanthemum ircutianum var. pinnatifidum
intro: Leucanthemum ircutianum var. pinnatifidum, also known as the white daisy, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum ircutianum var. pinnatifidum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
